meta.title: SAST Tools For Secure PLC Programming
meta.description:
Sam reveals open source proof of concept tools to automatically test PLC logic/code/applications. It automates verification of parts of the Top 20 Secure PLC Coding Practices. 

Come see the tools, and how they can be used in practical examples.

PLC programmers should be getting early automated feedback on how to program and configure PLCs securely, and these new open source tools are one solution to help.

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
